message:
Fix multiple issues: hook config, sync summaries, and Node.js compatibility

Resolves GitHub issues #10, #9, and #5:

• Fix SessionStart hook configuration (closes #10)
  - Remove invalid 'args' property from hook config
  - Include sync command directly in 'command' property
  - Add 'async: true' to prevent blocking Claude startup

• Fix summary generation failure in sync (closes #5)
  - Remove sessionId parameter from summarizeConversation() in batch mode
  - Prevents empty prompts being sent to Claude for archived conversations
  - Maintains full conversation text for proper summarization

• Add Node.js compatibility fix for better-sqlite3 (closes #9)
  - Add postinstall script to rebuild native modules
  - Resolves NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch issues
  - Graceful fallback if rebuild fails

All fixes tested with successful TypeScript compilation.

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@
   "scripts": {
     "build": "tsc && npm run bundle",
     "bundle": "esbuild src/mcp-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/mcp-server.js --external:fsevents --external:@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk --external:sharp --external:onnxruntime-node --external:better-sqlite3 --external:@xenova/transformers --external:sqlite-vec",
+    "postinstall": "npm rebuild better-sqlite3 2>/dev/null || true",
     "test": "vitest run",
     "test:watch": "vitest"
   },
